questions.text: Which of these is a traditional water harvesting structure?
questions.explanation: Khadin is a traditional water harvesting system in Rajasthan. Tube wells, hand pumps, and canals are modern water management structures.

questions.text: Recycling of paper helps in conservation of forests.
questions.explanation: Recycling paper reduces the need for cutting trees, thus helping in forest conservation.

questions.text: What is the main aim of the Ganga Action Plan?
questions.correctAnswer: To reduce pollution and clean the Ganga river.
questions.explanation: Ganga Action Plan aims to reduce pollution by treating sewage and industrial waste before it enters the Ganga river.

questions.text: The three R's for conservation are Reduce, Reuse, and ________.
questions.explanation: The three R's are Reduce (minimize use), Reuse (use again), and Recycle (process waste into new products).
